ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the participant (e.g., P15) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "primary_therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary therapist assigned to the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the participant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapists" (
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the therapist */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the therapist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the therapist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the therapist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the therapist */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the therapist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the therapist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the therapist record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the therapist record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the therapy session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the therapy session (e.g., baseline, post-treatment) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the therapy session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the therapy session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the therapy session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the therapy session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapy condition (e.g., blocked, interleaved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapy condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the condition record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phonemes" (
  "phoneme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phoneme */,
  "phoneme" TEXT /* Phoneme being trained (e.g., th) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phoneme */,
  "ipa_symbol" TEXT /* IPA symbol of the phoneme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the phoneme record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the phoneme record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the phoneme record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phoneme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., tx) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item type record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the item type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the therapy phase (e.g., baseline, post-treatment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapy phase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the phase record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the phase record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the phase record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapy item */,
  "item_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the item (e.g., th-9) */,
  "phoneme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phoneme associated with the item */,
  "item_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the therapy item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the item record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_items_item_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_type_id") REFERENCES item_types ("item_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_items_phoneme_id FOREIGN KEY ("phoneme_id") REFERENCES phonemes ("phoneme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions_items" (
  "session_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-item association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy item */,
  "trials" INTEGER /* Number of trials for the item in the session */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Response of the participant (e.g., 1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "n_baselines" INTEGER /* Number of baseline sessions for the item */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the item in the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the item in the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-item record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-item record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session-item record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES therapy_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_items_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions_conditions" (
  "session_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-condition association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-condition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-condition record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session-condition record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES therapy_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions_phases" (
  "session_phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-phase association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy phase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-phase record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-phase record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session-phase record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_phases_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES therapy_phases ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_phases_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions_therapists" (
  "session_therapist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-therapist association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-therapist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-therapist record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session-therapist record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_therapist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_therapists_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_therapists_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapy_sessions_participants" (
  "session_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-participant association */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapy session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session-participant record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the session-participant record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES therapy_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapy_sessions_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
